tasks_today.name: Female Entrepreneur application
Print out ring sheet to put up in the studio
Write script for personal training onboarding videos (with JoJo and Eilis)
Speak to JoJo about implementing a functional 360 screen for members
Nutrition section guide — when do members get personalised nutrition? (Jump Start)
Welcome sequence: explain classes are beginner friendly for Jump Start
Add 30-day cancellation notice and class notice to welcome sequence for full members
Consider updating your project progress
tasks_today.notes:
Update your project progress to keep stakeholders and teammates on the same page

These projects need a progress update:
https://app.asana.com/0/1213271936070486/progress

tasks_today.name: Audit Fit Pro landing page vs M Power landing page
tasks_today.notes:
Review the Fit Pro landing page to confirm everything that's included in the offer is actually listed on the page (nothing missing).

Also do a competitor comparison against what Empire are doing on their equivalent landing page — check their inclusions, positioning, and offer structure to see where we're ahead/behind.

tasks_today.name: JoJo to record PT explainer video for landing page
tasks_today.notes:
When a client or potential client books a personal training call, they should be sent a video (for the PT landing page) that covers:
- How personal training works at Forge
- What it costs
- What will be discussed on the personal training call

Action: JoJo to record this video. Then get it placed on landing page + wired into the booking flow.

tasks_today.name: Automation: Jump Start call booked → send info video
tasks_today.notes:
Once a Jump Start potential client books a call, set up an automation to send them a video covering:
- What's included in Jump Start
- What will be covered/discussed on the call

Needs automation trigger (booking confirmation) + video content + delivery method (email/SMS).
